top_blockers.name: Secrets handling未確定

resolved_recently: Human Navigator guide for Vercel 2FA added
Human Risk added as discussion metric
Trust Rules extracted from existing discussions
Supabase Project URL recorded as public-safe evidence

knowledge_blocker.name: No automated Knowledge Audit yet
knowledge_blocker.impact: Outdated docs or decisions may remain in use
knowledge_blocker.next_action: Run Weekly Knowledge Audit manually until automation exists

architecture_audit_blocker.name: Manual route and status synchronization
architecture_audit_blocker.impact: Human Console, Status JSON, and guides can drift apart
architecture_audit_blocker.next_action: Run Weekly Route / Connection / Broken Links audit manually until automation exists

multi_codex_blocker.name: Multi-Codex is premature
multi_codex_blocker.impact: Parallel workers could create conflicts without task queue, validation, branch rules, and trust scores
multi_codex_blocker.next_action: Focus on single-Codex Task Queue operation first

ai_routing_blocker.name: Browser-capable AI not verified
ai_routing_blocker.impact: Security setup guidance could be routed to the wrong AI/tool if based on memory or assumption
ai_routing_blocker.next_action: Compare official docs and actual account capabilities for ChatGPT / Codex / Gemini / Claude / Browser Agent

trust_rule_blocker.name: Trust Rules are not yet automated
trust_rule_blocker.impact: AI can still skip Official Docs / Evidence / Approval unless the checklist is manually applied
trust_rule_blocker.next_action: Use Rule_Audit_Checklist.md before the next external-service setup or AI routing decision

route_audit_blocker.name: Routes are still mostly document references
route_audit_blocker.impact: Human Console can point to files, but not all routes are clickable or automatically validated
route_audit_blocker.next_action: Run weekly Route Audit and convert high-use routes into clickable cards

supabase_blocker.name: Vercel Environment Variables not configured
supabase_blocker.impact: Evolution Factory cannot use Supabase until public URL/key and server secrets are configured in the proper environment
supabase_blocker.next_action: Get Project URL and anon/publishable key; do not copy service_role / secret key into chat or Git
